data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of invoice generation from an approved timesheet. However, the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality is operational. The linked use case mentions the need for invoice generation but lacks specific evidence of how this is implemented, indicating a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of the API or process that generates invoices from approved timesheets.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for invoice generation API
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the invoice generation from approved timesheets.
